accessId.description: The identifier of the membership or ownership assignment relationship to the group. Required. The possible values are: owner, member,  unknownFutureValue. Supports $filter (eq).

assignmentScheduleId.description: The identifier of the privilegedAccessGroupAssignmentSchedule from which this instance was created. Required. Supports $filter (eq, ne).

assignmentType.description: Indicates whether the membership or ownership assignment is granted through activation of an eligibility or through direct assignment. Required. The possible values are: assigned, activated, unknownFutureValue. Supports $filter (eq).

groupId.description: The identifier of the group representing the scope of the membership or ownership assignment through PIM for Groups. Optional. Supports $filter (eq).

memberType.description: Indicates whether the assignment is derived from a group assignment. It can further imply whether the caller can manage the assignment schedule. Required. The possible values are: direct, group, unknownFutureValue. Supports $filter (eq).

principalId.description: The identifier of the principal whose membership or ownership assignment to the group is managed through PIM for Groups. Required. Supports $filter (eq).

activatedUsing.description: When the request activates a membership or ownership in PIM for Groups, this object represents the eligibility request for the group. Otherwise, it is null.

group.description: References the group that is the scope of the membership or ownership assignment through PIM for Groups. Supports $expand.

principal.description: References the principal that's in the scope of the membership or ownership assignment request through the group that's governed by PIM. Supports $expand.
